title: Seeded Grass
description: Adds ability to craft grass blocks from dirt and seeds
body:
# **Seeded Grass Datapack**  

*Transform your Minecraft world with the Seeded Grass Datapack! No more waiting for grass to spread—now you can craft grass blocks easily with just dirt and wheat seeds.*  

## **Crafting Recipe Example:**  
**Dirt + Wheat Seeds = Grass Block**  
![Seeded Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c5ed64bdb4841c5094008a560357bfbf4a5abae.png)

### **How to Use:**  
1. Download the Seeded Grass Datapack.  
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.  
3. Start crafting and bring life to barren landscapes instantly!  

### **Compatibility:**  
- No additional dependencies required.  

### **Revive Your World:**  
Perfect for builders and survival players, this simple yet effective datapack helps you create lush environments without waiting for natural grass spread. Whether you're landscaping or just need a quick fix, Seeded Grass makes greenery more accessible than ever!  

**Download now and start crafting a greener world in Minecraft!**
